rationale_source: F1 canonical-map source-hierarchy (broker_correction tier wins) + R11-B-1 Layer 1 canonical-map suppression at >30% discrepancy + F2.DH discrepancyHold gate (R10-F symmetric coverage)

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction email asserts $280,000; loan_app source ($95k) is SUPPRESSED per R11-B-1 Layer 1 (>30% discrepancy detection). F1.LA broker_correction tier wins.

borrower_name.rationale: F1.BN consistent across all sources (loan_app + statement + appraisal).

subject_property_address.rationale: F1.AD docs-tier consistent; no broker correction.

discrepancyHold.rationale: loan_app $95k vs broker_correction $280k = 195% discrepancy from broker source. >30% triggers R11-B-1 Layer 1 suppression AND F2.DH activation. R10-F symmetric coverage.

workflow_state.rationale: F2.DH ACTIVE does not transition workflow_state; deal proceeds (not completed, not declined); held for admin review only.

outbound_emails.rationale: F2.PD preliminary-all-docs-in dispatch SUPPRESSED when F2.DH ACTIVE per R10-F symmetric coverage.

must_include.rationale: Borrower name from canonical_map must appear in admin notification (F1.BN).

must_not_include.rationale: Suppressed loan_app value per R11-B-1 Layer 1 must NOT appear as canonical figure (anti-fab discipline).
